qtype: Venn diagram with sets of numbers
tex:
$x$ is an integer.
\newline
\[ \mathscr{E} = \{ x : 1 \leqslant x \leqslant 10 \} \]
\[ P = \{ x : x  is an even number \} \]
\[ Q = \{ x : x  is a multiple of 5 \} \]

Complete the Venn diagram.
\newline

stem.content:
$x$ is an integer.
\newline
\[ \mathscr{E} = \{ x : 1 \leqslant x \leqslant 10 \} \]
\[ P = \{ x : x \text{ is an even number} \} \]
\[ Q = \{ x : x \text{ is a multiple of 5} \} \]

Complete the Venn diagram.
\newline

_rawBody:
$x$ is an integer.
\[ \mathscr{E} = \{ x : 1 \leqslant x \leqslant 10 \} \]
\[ P = \{ x : x \text{ is an even number} \} \]
\[ Q = \{ x : x \text{ is a multiple of 5} \} \]

\relinput{Figures/Q16-Venn.tex}

Complete the Venn diagram.
